actions-get-all.description: Get all actions in the project. Actions are reusable event definitions that can combine multiple trigger conditions (page views, clicks, form submissions) into a single trackable event for use in insights and funnels.
actions-get-all.title: Get all actions

action-create.description: Create a new action in the project. Actions define reusable event triggers based on page views, clicks, form submissions, or custom events. At least one step is required.
action-create.title: Create action

action-get.description: Get a specific action by ID. Returns the action configuration including all steps and their trigger conditions.
action-get.title: Get action

action-update.description: Update an existing action by ID. Can update name, description, steps, tags, and Slack notification settings.
action-update.title: Update action

action-delete.description: Delete an action by ID. The action will no longer appear in lists but historical data is preserved.
action-delete.title: Delete action

cohorts-list.description: List all cohorts in the project. Cohorts are groups of users that share common properties or behaviors. Returns both static cohorts (manually defined user lists) and dynamic cohorts (automatically updated based on filters). Use the 'type' parameter to filter by cohort type.
cohorts-list.title: List all cohorts

cohorts-create.description: Create a new cohort. For dynamic cohorts, provide 'filters' with property conditions. For static cohorts, set 'is_static: true', then use 'cohorts-add-persons-to-static-cohort' to add person UUIDs. Dynamic cohort filters use a nested structure with AND/OR groups containing person property filters (type: "person"), behavioral filters (type: "behavioral"), or references to other cohorts (type: "cohort").
cohorts-create.title: Create cohort

cohorts-retrieve.description: Get a specific cohort by ID. Returns the cohort configuration including name, description, filters (for dynamic cohorts), count of matching users, and calculation status.
cohorts-retrieve.title: Get cohort

cohorts-partial-update.description: Update an existing cohort. Can update name, description, and filters. For dynamic cohorts, changing filters will trigger a recalculation of matching users. Note: cohorts used in active feature flags cannot have behavioral filters added. To delete a cohort, set 'deleted: true' (soft delete).
cohorts-partial-update.title: Update cohort

cohorts-add-persons-to-static-cohort-par.description: Add persons to a static cohort by their UUIDs. Only works for static cohorts (is_static: true). Provide a list of person UUIDs in 'person_ids'. Maximum batch size is limited.
cohorts-add-persons-to-static-cohort-par.title: Add persons to static cohort

cohorts-remove-person-from-static-cohort.description: Remove a person from a static cohort by their UUID. Only works for static cohorts (is_static: true). This operation is idempotent - removing a person who isn't in the cohort will succeed without error.
cohorts-remove-person-from-static-cohort.title: Remove person from static cohort

error-tracking-issues-list.description: List all error tracking issues in the project. Returns issues with status, volume, first/last seen timestamps, and assignee info.
error-tracking-issues-list.title: List error tracking issues

error-tracking-issues-retrieve.description: Get a specific error tracking issue by ID. Returns full issue details including status, description, volume, and metadata.
error-tracking-issues-retrieve.title: Get error tracking issue

error-tracking-issues-partial-update.description: Update an error tracking issue. Can change status (active, resolved, suppressed), assign to a user, or update description.
error-tracking-issues-partial-update.title: Update error tracking issue
